verses.text: They keep the passover in the wilderness, as commanded. Passover. They remember their redemption.
They keep the passover in the wilderness, as commanded. Passover. They remember their redemption.
They keep the passover in the wilderness, as commanded. Passover. They remember their redemption.
They keep the passover in the wilderness, as commanded. Passover. They remember their redemption.
They keep the passover in the wilderness, as commanded. Passover. They remember their redemption.
Some, defiled by a dead body, ask what they should do. A question. Defilement seems to bar them.
Some, defiled by a dead body, ask what they should do. A question. Defilement seems to bar them.
Some, defiled by a dead body, ask what they should do. A question. Defilement seems to bar them.
God appoints a second passover a month later for the unclean or far off. Second chance. God makes a way for the hindered.
God appoints a second passover a month later for the unclean or far off. Second chance. God makes a way for the hindered.
God appoints a second passover a month later for the unclean or far off. Second chance. God makes a way for the hindered.
God appoints a second passover a month later for the unclean or far off. Second chance. God makes a way for the hindered.
He that neglects it without cause bears his sin; the stranger may keep it. No excuse. The feast is not to be despised.
He that neglects it without cause bears his sin; the stranger may keep it. No excuse. The feast is not to be despised.
The cloud covers the tabernacle; when it lifts, they journey. The cloud. God's presence leads them.
The cloud covers the tabernacle; when it lifts, they journey. The cloud. God's presence leads them.
The cloud covers the tabernacle; when it lifts, they journey. The cloud. God's presence leads them.
They move or rest at the cloud's bidding. Led. They follow God's signal.
They move or rest at the cloud's bidding. Led. They follow God's signal.
They move or rest at the cloud's bidding. Led. They follow God's signal.
Whether by day or night, they keep the LORD's charge. Obedient. They go and stay at His word.
Whether by day or night, they keep the LORD's charge. Obedient. They go and stay at His word.
